source_title: 04 Tunnel - Raya and the Last Dragon/05 Sequencer - Intro

evidences.content: 现在，我们已经有了一个非常基本的场景表示、 So now that we have a really basic representation of our scene, 让我们创建一个摄像头，这样就可以开始预览我们的镜头，并将其与 let's create a camera so we can start previewing our shot and matching it to 我们的参照物一一对应。 our reference one-to-one. 因此，如果我回到 UE VFX 文件夹，并转到序列、 So if I go back to our UE VFX folder and I go to sequences, 让我们创建一个名为 Raya01 的新文件夹。 let's create a new folder called Raya01. 现在，让我们创建一个新的关卡序列。 And now let's create a new level sequence. 因此，它存在于 "场景"、"关卡序列 "中、 So this exists under Cinematics, Level Sequence, 然后输入 ls underscore Raya01 underscore and I'm going to type in ls underscore Raya01 underscore 封锁。让我双击打开它。 blockout. Let me double click this to open it. 现在，这是我们创建的第一条时间线。现在开始 And now this is our first timeline that we've created. Now, 像静态网格编辑器或骨骼网格编辑器这样的序列器是自己的 sequencer like the static mesh editor or the skeletal mesh editor is its own 虚幻中的小插件。 little plugin inside of Unreal. 在这里，我们要花费大量时间来创建我们的序列。 And this is where we'll spend a lot of time creating our sequences inside of 不真实所以，有几件事要马上说、 Unreal. So a few things right off the bat, 我们要把它从每秒 30 帧改为 24 帧。 we want to change this from 30 frames per second to 24. 我们要确保默认情况下启用了捕捉功能。 We'll want to make sure this snapping is enabled by default. 这将确保我们的时间指示器始终处于整帧上。 This will make sure that our time indicator is always on a whole frame. 如果我们禁用这个功能、 If we disable this, 我们会看到在帧数旁边出现了一个小星号 we'll see that there's a little asterisk that appears next to our frame count 这里。现在，如果我按加号键放大我们的时间轴、 here. And now if I press the plus key to zoom into our timeline, 你可以看到，我可以在帧之间拖动时间指示器。 you can see that I can drag the time indicator in between our frames. 但现在如果我启用抢拍或按下 D 键、 But now if I enable snapping or press the D key, 该时间指示器将快进到最接近的整帧。 that time indicator will snap to the nearest whole frame. 这在初期并不重要、 This isn't that important early on, 但从一开始就养成这种习惯真的很好，因为我们希望 but this is a really good habit to build from the very beginning because we want 以确保我们在视口中看到的正是我们要 to make sure that whatever we're seeing in our viewport is exactly what we'll 当我们将其呈现出来时，就会收到。 receive when we render this out. 因此，我们可以点击创建新相机按钮、 So we can click this create a new camera button, 这样做有几个好处。 and this will do a couple things right off the bat. 它会在我们的场景中创建一个新的电影摄影机演员、 It'll create a new cine camera actor into our scene, 就会创建一个摄像机剪切轨迹。现在，如果你按下这个按钮 and it'll create a camera cut track. Now, if you press this button, 你会看到我们的电影摄影机演员旁边有一个小闪电图标。 you'll see our cine camera actor has this little lightning bolt icon next to it. 这意味着，只有当我们打开音序器时，才会创建它。 And this means that it's only created when we have our sequencer open. 所以，如果我关闭这个、 So if I close this, 你会发现我们的大纲器中不再有摄像头、 you'll see that we no longer have a camera in our outliner, 只有当我们打开音序器时，才能将其恢复。 and we'll only get that back when we open up our sequencer. 这个闪电告诉我们，它是一个可生成的角色。 So this lightning bolt tells us that it's a spawnable actor. 我不喜欢在我们为以下目的创建的场景中出现可生成的演员 And I'm not a fan of having spawnable actors in a scene that we're creating for 视觉特效，因为我们希望场景中的一切始终存在。 VFX, because we want everything in our scene to exist at all times. 这主要用于视频游戏，因为您可能会想要生成一个摄像头。 This is mostly used for video games when you might want to spawn a camera. 在播放电影时，您可能想催生特定的东西、 You might want to spawn specific things just for the cinematic as it's playing, 但在使用虚幻技术制作视觉特效时，它实际上没有任何作用。 but it doesn't really serve any purpose when using Unreal for visual effects. 因此，您可以右键点击任何演员，将其转换为可拥有。 So you can right click any actor and convert it to possessible. 这将确保我们的电影摄影机演员的存在、 And this will make sure that our cine camera actor exists, 即使我们关闭音序器。现在，请注意 even when we close sequencer. Now, just so you're aware, 我要删除这个电影摄影机演员、 I'm just going to delete this cine camera actor, 然后删除相机轨迹。 and I'm going to delete the camera track. 如果你曾想从头开始制作、 And if you ever wanted to create this from scratch, 只需进入快速添加演员按钮，转到电影镜头、 just go to your quick add actors button, go to cinematics, 就可以将电影摄影机演员拖入场景中。 and you can drag in a cine camera actor into your scene. 现在将其添加到音序器中、 Now to add this into sequencer, 我们可以单击并将其拖入时间线。 we can either click and drag it into our timeline. 如果是关卡序列中的第一个摄像头、 And if it's the first camera in your level sequence, 就会自动创建摄影机剪切轨迹。 it'll automatically create a camera cut track. 现在，我们正在驾驶我们的相机。 And now we're piloting our camera. 因此，我们的电影摄影机演员旁边的这个小摄影机图标将 So this little camera icon here next to our cine camera actor will 将该相机锁定到我们的视口、 lock this camera to our viewport, 但它也会让我们进行试点，现在我们可以移动摄像头。 but it will also have us piloting this where we can now move our camera around. 现在，我们可以使用 WASD 控制器拨动摄像头的位置。 And now we can dial the camera position using the WASD controls. 现在我们可以用 WASD 键来移动、 Now we have WASD to move around, 但我们也有 Q 和 E 按钮，其中 Q 按钮会让我们向下俯冲，而 E but we also have the Q and the E buttons where Q will crane us down and E 将鹤立鸡群。再来、 will crane up. And again, 您可以右击并按下鼠标滚轮来降低我们的相机速度。 you can right click and press the mouse wheel to decrease our camera speeds. 因此，你可以在相机的定位上获得非常精细的细节。 So you can get really fine detail in where you want to position your camera. 现在，如果我们靠近回声、 Now, if we get up close to Echo here, 我们可以看到她完全失焦了。这是因为默认情况下 we can see that she's completely out of focus. And this is because by default, 手动对焦距离设置为 100 万单位距离。 the manual focus distance is set to 1 million units away. 所以，如果我看看我的电影摄影机演员、 So if I look at my cine camera actor here, 让我们向下滚动细节面板，查看焦点设置。 let's scroll down in our details panel and go to the focus settings. 如果我们点击这个绘制调试焦点平面、 And if we click on this draw debug focus plane, 这将显示场景中的焦点位置。现在它在超远处。 this will show us where our focus is in the scene. Now it's super far away. 因此，我必须把它拖到几厘米远的地方，以便对焦 So I'm going to have to drag it to just a couple centimeters away to focus on 这里是回声我们可以清楚地看到它与她脸部的交汇处。 Echo here. And we can see exactly where it intersects with her face. 因此，我们可以对焦点进行微调。 So we can fine tune the focus point. 但我们可以做的另一件事是将这种聚焦方法改为跟踪、 But another thing we can do is change this focus method to tracking, 然后我们就可以选择一个可以动态关注的演员。 and then we can select an actor that we can focus on dynamically. 这样我们就可以在场景中移动，并确保 Echo 始终处于 This way we can move around the scene and we'll make sure that Echo is always in 而且，我们在移动和拍摄时也无需手动调整。 And we don't have to manually tweak this as we move around and reframe our shots. 我们还可以改变焦距、 We can also change the focal length, 也就是我们的镜头放大或缩小的程度。 which is how far our lens is zoomed in or out the best way to train your eye 关于照相机的时期，以及如何在一个 period about cameras and recreating real life cameras and lenses inside a 数字世界并不是要花大量时间使用 CG、 digital world is not to spend a bunch of time using CG, 但它是用真正的相机和单反相机到外面去，看看到底是如何 but it's to go outside with a real camera with a DSLR and see exactly how these 镜头的工作原理。但如果你以前从未做过，那就再来一次、 lenses work. But if you've never done that before, again, 其中一个神奇的数字是，你最想使用的镜头广度约为 18。 one of those magic numbers is the widest lens you'll want to go is about 18. 如果你开始走得更多、 If you start to go more, 这将变得极不现实，您可能希望保持在 200 以下 it'll become extremely unrealistic and you'll probably want to stay below 200 毫米的焦距。但回过头来看我们的参照物、 millimeters for a focal length. But looking back at our reference, 我只是猜测，但我觉得这应该是 35 毫米的镜头。 I'm just going to guess here, but I'll say this is about a 35 millimeter lens. 现在，让我们开始构图。我在这里使用的是 PureRef。 And now let's start to frame up our shot. So I'll keep this up while I'm adjusting our 3d scene. 我们最后不得不把隧道改成曲线形、 We're going to have to end up curving our tunnel, 但现在我只是要复制我们的隧道，我只是要 but for now I'm just going to make a duplicate of our tunnel and I'm just going 使其轻微旋转，以模仿正在发生的事情。 to give it a slight rotation to mimic what's going on. 我们将把它移到合适的位置，现在让我再拿一盏灯，然后我们再把它移到合适的位置。 We'll move that into place and now let me grab another light and we'll alt 在场景中点击并向下拖动。 click and drag this further down through our scene. 我们对地板平面也做同样的处理。 And let's do the same for the floor plane. 因此，让我们把它拖出来并放大，使它与地面相交。 So let's drag this out and scale it up so that it intersects with our floor. 我看得出，我们的小玩意儿与世界保持一致，而不是与这台机器的旋转保持一致。 I can tell our gizmo is aligned with the world and not the rotation of this 对象。因此，我将按下我们的转换小工具，即 Tilde 键。 object. With this camera icon, 而不是查看相机剪辑。 you want to view your camera cut instead. 而当你观看镜头剪切，而不是驾驶你的演员时、 And when you view the camera cut instead of piloting your actor, 如果你在这个场景中点击右键、 if you right click in this scene, 就无法移动或旋转相机。 you won't be able to move or rotate your camera around. 现在，我在场景中点击右键、 So right now I'm right clicking inside of our scene, 但我再也无法旋转或前后移动它了。 but I'm not able to rotate it or move it back and forth anymore. 因此，记住这一点非常重要、 So this is really important to remember, 确保在您的序列中查看镜头切口，而不是驾驶您的 make sure to view the camera cut inside of your sequence instead of piloting your 摄像。所以我觉得我们在这里很不错。 camera. So one tip that I have here, 如果你想匹配摄像机的位置，你可以计算出 if you're trying to match the camera position is figure out the height of the 场景中的摄像机。你通常可以通过观察得出结论、 camera in the scene. And you can usually figure this out by seeing, 几何图形中透视线变化的地方。 where the perspective lines change in the geometry. 如果你的场景是由盒子组成的，这就非常简单了。 This is really easy when your scene is made out of boxes. 就像你看到的是城市街道，而不是弯曲的隧道。 Like if you're looking down a city street as opposed to a curved tunnel. 但在这种情况下，我们可以看到这些不同岩石的弧度。 But in this case we can see the curvature of these different rocks here. 如果你仔细观察这些砖块、 And if you look at these individual bricks, 你可以看到他们的视角是这样的。 you can see that they're going off in perspective like this. 到了一定程度，它们就开始向下移动。 And at a certain point they start to shift downwards. 因此，在这个平衡点上，我们的摄像机高度将大致达到 So at this point of equilibrium is roughly where our camera height is going to 因此，我希望相机的高度大致在这个高度附近。 So I want the height of my camera to roughly be somewhere around this height. 如果我回顾一下我在这里的场景、 And if I look back in my scene here, 我可以慢慢地开始向上或向下移动，看看平衡点到底在哪里。 I can just slowly start to crane up or down to see exactly where that equilibrium 点是。因此，如果我站得太高，就能看到那条透视线、 point is.
